ItacWorkItem.Notes: Antonio Duodo, the son of Nicolo, rents a place to the Accademia Veneziana in Rialto. The owner of the place is Duodo`s nephew Giusto Antonio Frizier. The contract starts on 1 April 1560.
ItacWorkItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
